# io_genotypes.Variants { #tspaint.io_genotypes.Variants }

```python
tspaint.io_genotypes.Variants(
    positions,
    genotypes,
    alleles,
    sequence_length,
    sample_names=None,
)
```

A tool-agnostic biallelic variant matrix (one column per **haplotype**).

## Attributes {.doc-section .doc-section-attributes}

<code>[**positions**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[numpy](`numpy`).[ndarray](`numpy.ndarray`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   ``(S,)`` integer site positions (sorted, strictly increasing).

<code>[**genotypes**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[numpy](`numpy`).[ndarray](`numpy.ndarray`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   ``(S, H)`` allele indices (``int8``; 0 = ancestral/REF, 1 = derived/ALT) over ``H`` haplotype columns (``samples × ploidy``).

<code>[**alleles**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[list](`list`)\[[tuple](`tuple`)\[[str](`str`), [str](`str`)\]\]]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Per-site ``(ref, alt)`` allele strings.

<code>[**sequence_length**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Sequence length for the inferred tree sequence.

<code>[**sample_names**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[list](`list`)\[[str](`str`)\] or None]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Optional haplotype/sample names (length ``H``).
